ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "icd10_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code for the disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the disease (e.g., Infectious and parasitic diseases) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms of the disease */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Common treatment options for the disease */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co_occurrences" (
  "co_occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-occurrence event */,
  "disease1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first disease */,
  "disease2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second disease */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of patients with both diseases */,
  "co_occurrence_rate" REAL /* Co-occurrence rate between the two diseases */,
  "odds_ratio" REAL /* Odds ratio for the co-occurrence */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the co-occurrence */,
  "ci_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "ci_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "study_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the study or source of the co-occurrence data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_occurrences_disease2_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease2_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_occurrences_disease1_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease1_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief summary of the patient's medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Clinician who made the diagnosis */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Prescribed treatment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comorbidities" (
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comorbidity event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "disease1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first disease */,
  "disease2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second disease */,
  "comorbidity_date" TEXT /* Date of the comorbidity */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the comorbidity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comorbidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comorbidities_disease2_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease2_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comorbidities_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comorbidities_disease1_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease1_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_reports" (
  "kpi_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data (e.g., JSON or XML) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpis" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI */,
  "kpi_description" TEXT /* Description of the KPI */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the KPI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_values" (
  "kpi_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI value */,
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the KPI */,
  "kpi_value" REAL /* Value of the KPI */,
  "kpi_date" TEXT /* Date of the KPI value */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the KPI value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_values_kpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("kpi_id") REFERENCES kpis ("kpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_targets" (
  "kpi_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI target */,
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the KPI */,
  "kpi_target" REAL /* Target value of the KPI */,
  "kpi_date" TEXT /* Date of the KPI target */,
  "target_period" TEXT /* Period for which the target is set (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_targets_kpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("kpi_id") REFERENCES kpis ("kpi_id")
)
